LanguageData.Stratum_ModSettings_RoofFiresEnabled_Des: Fires will be able to spread to roofs and ignite them, and roof fires will be able to spread to other roofs.
LanguageData.Stratum_ModSettings_RoofFiresDisabled_De: Roofs will not catch on fire, and fires will not be able to spread to roofs.
LanguageData.Stratum_ModSettings_DropPodInterceptionE: High-integrity buildable roofs will block and redirect incoming drop pods and skyfallers (like meteorites and spaceship debris) to prevent them from landing directly inside your rooms.
LanguageData.Stratum_ModSettings_DropPodInterceptionD: Drop pods and skyfallers will ignore buildable roofs and land normally.
LanguageData.Stratum_ModSettings_SkylightCoatingEnabl: Skylights will passively accumulate dirt, pollen, and snow over time, reducing light transmission.
LanguageData.Stratum_ModSettings_SkylightCoatingDisab: Skylights will remain perfectly clean, allowing maximum light passage indefinitely.
LanguageData.Stratum_ModSettings_LightningStrikesTarg: Lightning strikes can target cells covered by roofs.
Lightning strikes will only target completely unroofed areas.
LanguageData.Stratum_ModSettings_RoofLightningExplosi: Lightning strikes hitting a roof will cause a rooftop explosion and fire.
Lightning strikes hitting a roof will not cause rooftop explosions or fires.
LanguageData.Stratum_ModSettings_SkylightLightingEnab: Natural light passes through skylights visually with light pools and floor illumination.
LanguageData.Stratum_ModSettings_SkylightLightingDisa: Skylight lighting and glow pools are disabled.
LanguageData.Stratum_ModSettings_SkylightShadowsEnabl: Dynamic floor shadows are cast under skylights by dirt, pollen, and snow coatings.
LanguageData.Stratum_ModSettings_SkylightShadowsDisab: Dynamic floor shadows under skylights are disabled.
LanguageData.Stratum_ModSettings_DirtGraphicsEnabled_: Render dirt overlay coatings on skylights and their shadows on the floor.
LanguageData.Stratum_ModSettings_DirtGraphicsDisabled: Dirt coatings and floor shadows are disabled.
LanguageData.Stratum_ModSettings_PollenGraphicsEnable: Render pollen overlay coatings on skylights and their shadows on the floor.
LanguageData.Stratum_ModSettings_PollenGraphicsDisabl: Pollen coatings and floor shadows are disabled.
LanguageData.Stratum_ModSettings_SnowGraphicsEnabled_: Render snow overlay coatings on roofs/skylights and their shadows on the floor.
LanguageData.Stratum_ModSettings_SnowGraphicsDisabled: Snow coatings and floor shadows are disabled.
LanguageData.Stratum_ModSettings_RoofDamageScratchesE: Render scratches overlay on damaged roofs.
LanguageData.Stratum_ModSettings_RoofDamageScratchesD: Damaged roofs will not display scratch visual overlays.
